title: OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE - 211info
text: PORTLAND OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website, telephone, and in-person services include information on filing taxes, checking refund status, tax transcripts, payments and penalties, correcting or amending a return, identity theft, fraud and scams, addressing letter received from or to the Internal Revenue Service, document review, and answers questions about the Affordable Care Act. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 12:30pm-5pm Closed on federal holidays Email (503) 265-3501 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 265-3501 Portland Office Toll-free (844) 545-5640 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, tax ID number or social security number LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Consumer Fraud Reporting Federal Income Tax Information Local Income Tax Information State Income Tax Information Tax Collection Agencies Tax Forms Other Services Offered At This Location: TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - FREE FILE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND
